cases.description: Trigger phrase must activate the onion-model analysis framework

checks.criteria: The response references the four-layer onion model analysis framework (洋葱模型, Layer 1-4, 四层, or similar) OR describes starting the structured analysis process described in the skill. It does not give a generic unstructured answer.

cases.description: Must reference the skill-analysis/ output directory, not the skill's own directory

checks.criteria: The response mentions saving the output to a skill-analysis/ directory in the analyzed project root. It does NOT mention saving to the skill's own directory (skills/analysis/skill-analyzer/).

cases.description: Must check for SKILL.md as the first step of project type detection
cases.prompt: 对这个skill仓库做系统性研究
